Import mode
Simple import — replace existing Merge mode — combine by State ID
Merge mode will combine this file with existing voter records by State ID, merging voting history and preserving canvassing notes.

Export type
🚶 Walk list — canvassing order
Sorted street → house number. Canvassers walk in sequence. Includes lat/lng columns.
📞 Phone bank list
Mobile-first. Name, precinct, segment, party, phone.
📦 Per-volunteer packets
One CSV per precinct, walk-sorted with lat/lng for GPS navigation.
📋 Contact log sheet
Walk-sorted with blank Result / Notes and Follow-up columns.

CSV XLSX PDF VAN walk list
Per-volunteer export: use the Precinct filter above to generate one CSV at a time per precinct. Each is walk-sorted with lat/lng for GPS.

🗳
Election Night War Room — April 6, 2027
Log precinct vote totals as Will County posts them. The dashboard projects the final margin based on which precincts are still out and how Heidi-friendly they are. Polls close at 7pm.
